objective: Clamp value: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun clamp (x lo hi) (if (< x lo) lo (if (> x hi) hi x))) (test "in" (eq? (clamp 5 0 10) 5)) (test "low" (eq? (clamp -3 0 10) 0)) (test "high" (eq? (clamp 99 0 10) 10)))

objective: Absolute difference: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun abs_diff (a b) (if (>= a b) (- a b) (- b a))) (test "a" (eq? (abs_diff 7 3) 4)) (test "b" (eq? (abs_diff 3 7) 4)) (test "c" (eq? (abs_diff 5 5) 0)))

objective: Average of three: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun avg3 (a b c) (/ (+ a b c) 3.0)) (test "a" (near? (avg3 1.0 2.0 3.0) 2.0)) (test "b" (near? (avg3 10.0 20.0 30.0) 20.0)))

objective: Is even: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun is_even (n) (= (mod n 2) 0)) (test "a" (eq? (is_even 4) true)) (test "b" (eq? (is_even 7) false)) (test "c" (eq? (is_even 0) true)))

objective: Is odd: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun is_odd (n) (= (mod n 2) 1)) (test "a" (eq? (is_odd 3) true)) (test "b" (eq? (is_odd 8) false)))

objective: Max of three: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun max3 (a b c) (if (and (>= a b) (>= a c)) a (if (>= b c) b c))) (test "a" (eq? (max3 1 2 3) 3)) (test "b" (eq? (max3 9 2 3) 9)) (test "c" (eq? (max3 1 8 3) 8)))

objective: Min of three: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun min3 (a b c) (if (and (<= a b) (<= a c)) a (if (<= b c) b c))) (test "a" (eq? (min3 1 2 3) 1)) (test "b" (eq? (min3 9 2 3) 2)) (test "c" (eq? (min3 9 8 3) 3)))

objective: Square: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun square (x) (* x x)) (test "a" (eq? (square 5) 25)) (test "b" (eq? (square 0) 0)) (test "c" (eq? (square -3) 9)))

objective: Cube: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun cube (x) (* x x x)) (test "a" (eq? (cube 3) 27)) (test "b" (eq? (cube 0) 0)) (test "c" (eq? (cube -2) -8)))

objective: Area of rectangle: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun area_rect (w h) (* w h)) (test "a" (eq? (area_rect 3 4) 12)) (test "b" (eq? (area_rect 7 5) 35)))

objective: Perimeter of rectangle: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun perim_rect (w h) (* 2 (+ w h))) (test "a" (eq? (perim_rect 3 4) 14)) (test "b" (eq? (perim_rect 5 5) 20)))

objective: Factorial: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun fact (n) (let ((r 1) (i 1)) (while (<= i n) (set r (* r i)) (set i (+ i 1))) r)) (test "0" (eq? (fact 0) 1)) (test "5" (eq? (fact 5) 120)) (test "6" (eq? (fact 6) 720)))

objective: Power of two: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun pow2 (n) (let ((r 1) (i 0)) (while (< i n) (set r (* r 2)) (set i (+ i 1))) r)) (test "0" (eq? (pow2 0) 1)) (test "3" (eq? (pow2 3) 8)) (test "10" (eq? (pow2 10) 1024)))

objective: Sum to n: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun sum_to_n (n) (/ (* n (+ n 1)) 2)) (test "5" (eq? (sum_to_n 5) 15)) (test "10" (eq? (sum_to_n 10) 55)) (test "100" (eq? (sum_to_n 100) 5050)))

objective: Sum of squares: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun sum_sq (n) (let ((s 0) (i 1)) (while (<= i n) (set s (+ s (* i i))) (set i (+ i 1))) s)) (test "3" (eq? (sum_sq 3) 14)) (test "5" (eq? (sum_sq 5) 55)))

objective: Sum array: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun sum_arr (a) (let ((s 0) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (set s (+ s (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) s)) (test "a" (eq? (sum_arr [1 2 3 4 5]) 15)) (test "empty" (eq? (sum_arr []) 0)))

objective: Max in array: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun max_arr (a) (let ((m (arr.get a 0)) (i 1) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (> (arr.get a i) m) (set m (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) m)) (test "a" (eq? (max_arr [3 1 4 1 5 9 2 6]) 9)) (test "b" (eq? (max_arr [-1 -3 -7]) -1)))

objective: Min in array: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun min_arr (a) (let ((m (arr.get a 0)) (i 1) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (< (arr.get a i) m) (set m (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) m)) (test "a" (eq? (min_arr [3 1 4 1 5 9 2 6]) 1)) (test "b" (eq? (min_arr [-1 -3 -7]) -7)))

objective: Product of array: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun prod_arr (a) (let ((p 1) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (set p (* p (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) p)) (test "a" (eq? (prod_arr [1 2 3 4]) 24)) (test "b" (eq? (prod_arr [5 5]) 25)))

objective: Count occurrences: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun count_eq (a x) (let ((c 0) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (= (arr.get a i) x) (set c (+ c 1))) (set i (+ i 1))) c)) (test "a" (eq? (count_eq [1 2 3 2 4 2] 2) 3)) (test "b" (eq? (count_eq [1 2 3] 9) 0)))

objective: Contains element: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun contains (a x) (let ((found false) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (= (arr.get a i) x) (set found true)) (set i (+ i 1))) found)) (test "yes" (eq? (contains [1 2 3] 2) true)) (test "no" (eq? (contains [1 2 3] 9) false)))

objective: Index of element: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun idx_of (a x) (let ((idx -1) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (and (= idx -1) (= (arr.get a i) x)) (set idx i)) (set i (+ i 1))) idx)) (test "found" (eq? (idx_of [10 20 30 40] 30) 2)) (test "miss" (eq? (idx_of [1 2 3] 9) -1)))

objective: All positive: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun all_pos (a) (let ((ok true) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (<= (arr.get a i) 0) (set ok false)) (set i (+ i 1))) ok)) (test "yes" (eq? (all_pos [1 2 3]) true)) (test "no" (eq? (all_pos [1 -2 3]) false)))

objective: Any negative: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun any_neg (a) (let ((found false) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (< (arr.get a i) 0) (set found true)) (set i (+ i 1))) found)) (test "yes" (eq? (any_neg [1 -2 3]) true)) (test "no" (eq? (any_neg [1 2 3]) false)))

objective: Average of array: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun avg_arr (a) (let ((s 0.0) (i 0) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (set s (+ s (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) (/ s n))) (test "a" (near? (avg_arr [2.0 4.0 6.0]) 4.0)) (test "b" (near? (avg_arr [10.0 20.0]) 15.0)))

objective: Range max minus min: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun range_v (a) (let ((mn (arr.get a 0)) (mx (arr.get a 0)) (i 1) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (< (arr.get a i) mn) (set mn (arr.get a i))) (if (> (arr.get a i) mx) (set mx (arr.get a i))) (set i (+ i 1))) (- mx mn))) (test "a" (eq? (range_v [3 1 4 1 5 9 2 6]) 8)) (test "b" (eq? (range_v [5 5 5]) 0)))

objective: Is sorted ascending: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun sorted_asc (a) (let ((ok true) (i 1) (n (arr.len a))) (while (< i n) (if (< (arr.get a i) (arr.get a (- i 1))) (set ok false)) (set i (+ i 1))) ok)) (test "yes" (eq? (sorted_asc [1 2 3 4]) true)) (test "no" (eq? (sorted_asc [1 3 2]) false)))

objective: Sign of number: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun sign (x) (if (> x 0) 1 (if (< x 0) -1 0))) (test "pos" (eq? (sign 5) 1)) (test "neg" (eq? (sign -3) -1)) (test "zero" (eq? (sign 0) 0)))

objective: Absolute value: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun abs_v (x) (if (< x 0) (- 0 x) x)) (test "pos" (eq? (abs_v 5) 5)) (test "neg" (eq? (abs_v -7) 7)) (test "zero" (eq? (abs_v 0) 0)))

objective: Double a number: write a small AGC module.
solution: (module (defun dbl (x) (* x 2)) (test "a" (eq? (dbl 5) 10)) (test "b" (eq? (dbl 0) 0)) (test "c" (eq? (dbl -3) -6)))
